name: ParentChildLayout
description: Arranges parent and child regions side by side and collapses to a single visible view at configured breakpoints.

collapseAtBreakpoint.description: Breakpoint at which the layout collapses from two regions to a single visible region.

visibleView.description: Determines which region is displayed when collapsed.

gap.description: Controls spacing between parent and child regions.

onCollapseChange.description: Callback fired when viewport enters or exits collapsed mode.

keyboard: Tab / Shift+Tab — move focus between interactive descendants in the currently visible region(s)
aria: Use semantic HTML landmarks/structure for parent and child content sections
Manage region labels (aria-label/aria-labelledby) when these sections act as named areas
